alternative_parents.description: Organic salt compounds containing a metal atom in its ionic form.
alternative_parents.name: Organic metal salts

alternative_parents.description: Organometallic compounds with the generic formula R-M-X, where R is an alkyl group, and X is a metal atom.
alternative_parents.name: Metal alkyl halides

alternative_parents.description: Derivatives of hydrocarbons obtained by substituting one or more carbon atoms by an heteroatom. They contain at least one carbon atom and heteroatom.
alternative_parents.name: Hydrocarbon derivatives

class.description: Organic compounds containing a post-transition metal atom.
class.name: Organo-post-transition metal compounds

description: This compound belongs to the class of organic compounds known as alkylaluminium halides. These are organoaluminium compounds containing an aluminium atom linked to an halide and an alkyl group. The three main structural sub-categories include the alkylaluminium dihalides, dialkylaluminium halides, and trialkyldialuminium trihalides.

direct_parent.description: Organoaluminium compounds containing an aluminium atom linked to an halide and an alkyl group. The three main structural sub-categories include the alkylaluminium dihalides, dialkylaluminium halides, and trialkyldialuminium trihalides.
direct_parent.name: Alkylaluminium halides

intermediate_nodes.description: Organoaluminium compounds where the aluminium atom is linked to an alkyl group.
intermediate_nodes.name: Alkylaluminium and derivatives

kingdom.description: Compounds that contain at least one carbon atom, excluding isocyanide/cyanide and their non-hydrocarbyl derivatives, thiophosgene, carbon diselenide, carbon monosulfide, carbon disulfide, carbon subsulfide, carbon monoxide, carbon dioxide, Carbon suboxide, and dicarbon monoxide.
kingdom.name: Organic compounds

subclass.description: Compounds containing bond between a carbon atom and an aluminum atom.
subclass.name: Organoaluminium compounds

superclass.description: Organic compounds containing a bond between a carbon atom and metal atom.
superclass.name: Organometallic compounds
